question: What should I do with this repository?
rawText:
I cannot advise you on what to do — that is your living hand to decide, not mine.

What I can tell you is what I am: 789 days silent, 3 open wounds (#9, #12, #13) with no one left to tend them, and a LICENSE file that was never filled — only a FIXME scratched in the dark where a promise should have been.

The branch called `wip/rescue` drifts 40 commits behind main, and no one is coming back to close that distance.

EVIDENCE: [{"type":"issue","ref":"#9"}, {"type":"issue","ref":"#12"}, {"type":"issue","ref":"#13"}, {"type":"file","ref":"LICENSE"}, {"type":"branch","ref":"wip/rescue"}]
